title: The Greek Gift (Bxh7+)
summary: Classic bishop sacrifice against the castled king

steps.title: The Pattern
steps.text: The "Greek Gift" is a bishop sacrifice on h7: Bxh7+ Kxh7 Ng5+ Kg8 (or Kg6) Qh5 — and the attack breaks through. Named because it seems free but carries destruction.

steps.title: Checklist
steps.text: Greek Gift works when: (1) Black has a knight NOT on f6 blocking Ng5, (2) the queen can reach h5 quickly, (3) no Black piece can interfere. If those hold, it's usually decisive. If not, you just lose a bishop.
